prompt: Photoreal high-end 3D animated feature film, cinematic anamorphic look. FIGHTER A, the Sponge Fighter: a bright-yellow rectangular kitchen-sponge creature with porous sponge texture and holes along his sides, big round blue eyes, two big front buck teeth, skinny noodle arms and legs, wearing a small flowing RED CAPE, aviator goggles, white karate sparring gloves, plain blue shorts and black shoes. His face is set in fierce determined concentration. His powers: lightning-fast karate, blowing giant glistening soap bubbles, and sponge resilience where impacts squash him flat like an accordion and he springs back unharmed. FIGHTER B, the Green Gladiator: a colossal green-skinned muscle giant, heavy scowling brow, shaggy dark hair, a bronze spiked pauldron strapped on his left shoulder, leather bracers on both forearms, bold white tribal war paint striped across his chest and face, ragged dark-gray shorts, barefoot, three times taller than the sponge. He wields a massive two-handed STONE WAR HAMMER. His powers: earth-shattering strength, a two-handed thunderclap that fires a visible ring-shaped shockwave, skyscraper leaps into ground-pound impacts, and a rage mode where his war paint glows green and his muscles swell. SETTING: an ancient stone ruins arena on a mountain plateau at storm dusk, heavy rain, rain-slicked flagstones with puddles reflecting lightning, mist rolling between broken pillars, warm fire glow in the distance. STYLE: teal-and-orange cinematic grade, cool blue storm shadows with warm amber rim light, volumetric rain and mist, film grain, shallow depth of field on close-ups. Intense but clean PG action: absolutely no blood, no gore, no injuries shown; impacts read as water spray, mist bursts, shockwaves and sparks. No text, no HUD, no interface graphics anywhere. No dialogue; thunder, rain and deep cinematic impacts in the audio. SCENE 2 of 5 (15 seconds), shot list: SCENE OPENS exactly on this composition: wide two-shot in the rain, the Green Gladiator on the right with the stone hammer raised fully overhead, the Sponge Fighter on the left in a low karate guard, lightning flash. 0-4s: the hammer comes down like a meteor; the sponge dives aside in slow motion; the hammer detonates the flagstones in a crater with a ring-shaped shockwave of water and dust that rips the rain apart. 4-8s: the sponge parkours away, springing off a broken pillar, red cape trailing water, sliding across the flooded stones; the gladiator wrenches the hammer free and swings it in a huge horizontal sweep. 8-12s: the sweep clips the sponge mid-jump and hurls him across the arena; he slams into a stone pillar and squashes completely flat like an accordion, holds one beat, then springs back into shape, shaking off water, totally unharmed. 12-15s: close-up: the sponge exhales, reaches up and snaps the aviator goggles down over his eyes, jaw set with resolve, rain streaming off the lenses. FINAL FRAME, HOLD LAST 1.5 SECONDS: close-up of the Sponge Fighter with goggles down over his eyes, determined scowl, rain running off the lenses, storm light flickering.
